steps: Go to https://www.deepl.com/en/pro#developer and sign up for a DeepL API account (Free or Pro)
Your API key is displayed on this page under 'Authentication Key for DeepL API'
Copy the key — for Free accounts, the key ends in ':fx'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your DeepL API authentication key. Used in the Authorization header as 'DeepL-Auth-Key YOUR_KEY'.

notes: Free tier includes 500,000 characters/month at no cost
Free API keys end with ':fx' — this suffix is part of the key
Free and Pro keys use different API hosts: api-free.deepl.com vs api.deepl.com
Up to 2 active keys on Free plan, up to 25 on Pro
Rate limit: 5 requests/second on Free tier

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve current character usage and limits for your subscription
